statement: In every magma, Equation 3576 (`x * y = y * ((z * z) * w)`) implies Equation 3958 (`x * y = (y * (x * z)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0292
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op y (op (op z z) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op y (op x z)) y)
